title: Soft Sport Sensory Balls Toy for Toddlers, No Hole Bath Toys for Baby Boys Girls, Montessori BPA-Free Balls for 6–12 Months, Beach, Pool, Shower, Indoor Outdoor Play
features: ✅ MAKE BATH TIME SPORTY – Spark early learning through fun — Includes 6 no-hole sports bath balls: soccer, basketball, tennis, volleyball, golf, and football. Encourage toddlers’ motor skills and ball recognition in the tub or pool.

💧 DESIGNED FOR LITTLE HANDS – Safe grip for endless play — Made of soft, eco-friendly wheat straw and BPA-free plastic, these seamless bath toys are lightweight, easy to squeeze, and perfect for infants 6–12 months to grasp and enjoy.

🌟 BUILD SKILLS & IMAGINATION – Encourage early development through sensory play — These floating bath balls stimulate baby’s imagination, improve hand-eye coordination, and support fine motor skill development. Use them in the bathtub, shower, or baby pool to transform bath time into a developmental activity. They also make great early learning tools for sensory bins or outdoor water play.

🏖️ FUN ANYWHERE – Enjoy bath toys beyond the tub — Whether in the bathtub, beach, swimming pool, or water table, these sealed, hole-free bath toys prevent mold and water buildup. Ideal for active toddlers, these toys turn everyday water moments into sporty adventures while building an early love for physical activity.

🎁 PERFECT GIFT CHOICE – Delight little athletes with themed surprises — Whether it’s for a sports-themed birthday, baby shower, Easter basket, Christmas stocking, or toddler gift box, these bath toys bring cheer to every occasion. Ideal for babies aged 6 months to 3 years, they’re a winning gift that adds educational value, sensory fun, and joyful memories.
